samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit divider module, the dividend is 16-bit and the divider is 8-bit in combinational logic. Extract the higher bits of the dividend, matching the bit width of the divisor. Compare these bits with the divisor: if the dividend bits are greater, set the quotient to 1, otherwise set it to 0, and use the difference as the remainder. Concatenate the remainder with the highest remaining 1-bit of the dividend, and repeat the process until all dividend bits are processed.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH" value="16">Bit width of the dividend and quotient.</parameter>
        <parameter id="DIV_WIDTH" value="8">Bit width of the divisor.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="temp_a" width_description="[15:0]">Temporary register to store the dividend.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_b" width_description="[7:0]">Temporary register to store the divisor.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_result" width_description="[15:0]">Temporary register to store the quotient.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_odd" width_description="[15:0]">Temporary register to store the remainder.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_b_reg" width_description="[7:0]">Temporary register to store the shifted divisor.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_a_bit">Temporary register to store the extracted bit from temp_a.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_b_bit">Temporary register to store the extracted bit from temp_b.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_result_bit">Temporary register to store the result bit.</reg>
        <reg id="temp_odd_bit">Temporary register to store the remainder bit.</reg>
        <reg id="i" value_description="[4]">Loop counter.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always id="always_1">
            <trigger>
                <always_trigger>always @(*)</always_trigger>
            </trigger>
            <description>Update temporary register temp_a with the value of input A.</description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>temp_a</lhs>
                <rhs>= A;</rhs>
            </assignment>
            <description>Update temporary register temp_b with the value of input B.</description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>temp_b</lhs>
                <rhs>= B;</rhs>
            </assignment>
        </always>
        <always id="always_2">
            <trigger>
                <always_trigger>always @(*)</always_trigger>
            </trigger>
            <description>
                <line>Initialize the temporary result to 0.</line>
            </description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>temp_result</lhs>
                <rhs>= 16'b0;</rhs>
            </assignment>
            <description>
                <line>Initialize the temporary remainder to 0.</line>
            </description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>temp_odd</lhs>
                <rhs>= 16'b0;</rhs>
            </assignment>
            <description>
                <line>Initialize the temporary divisor register.</line>
            </description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>temp_b_reg</lhs>
                <rhs>= {8'b0, temp_b};</rhs>
            </assignment>
            <description>
                <line>Initialize loop counter i to 15.</line>
            </description>
            <assignment>
                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                <lhs>i</lhs>
                <rhs>= 5'd15;</rhs>
            </assignment>
            <description>
                <line>Loop until i becomes 0.</line>
            </description>
            <if>
                <condition>i > 0</condition>
                <true>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>i</lhs>
                        <rhs>= i - 1;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Extract the most significant bit from temp_a.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_a_bit</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_a[i];</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Extract the least significant bit from temp_b_reg.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_b_bit</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_b_reg[0];</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Compare temp_a_bit with temp_b_bit.</line>
                    </description>
                    <if>
                        <condition>temp_a_bit >= temp_b_bit</condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>
                                <line>Set the corresponding bit in temp_result to 1.</line>
                            </description>
                            <assignment>
                                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                                <lhs>temp_result_bit</lhs>
                                <rhs>= 1'b1;</rhs>
                            </assignment>
                            <description>
                                <line>Subtract temp_b from temp_a.</line>
                            </description>
                            <assignment>
                                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                                <lhs>temp_odd_bit</lhs>
                                <rhs>= temp_a_bit - temp_b_bit;</rhs>
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>
                                <line>Set the corresponding bit in temp_result to 0.</line>
                            </description>
                            <assignment>
                                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                                <lhs>temp_result_bit</lhs>
                                <rhs>= 1'b0;</rhs>
                            </assignment>
                            <description>
                                <line>Subtract temp_a_bit from temp_a.</line>
                            </description>
                            <assignment>
                                <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                                <lhs>temp_odd_bit</lhs>
                                <rhs>= temp_a_bit - temp_b_bit;</rhs>
                            </assignment>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                    <description>
                        <line>Shift temp_odd to the left.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_odd</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_odd << 1;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Set the least significant bit of temp_odd to the result bit.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_odd[0]</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_result_bit;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Shift temp_a to the left.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_a</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_a << 1;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Set the least significant bit of temp_a to the result bit.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_a[0]</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_result_bit;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Shift temp_b_reg to the left.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>temp_b_reg</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_b_reg << 1;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
                <false>
                    <description>
                        <line>Assign the value of temp_odd to the output odd.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>odd</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_odd;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                    <description>
                        <line>Assign the value of temp_result to the output result.</line>
                    </description>
                    <assignment>
                        <assignment_type>non-blocking</assignment_type>
                        <lhs>result</lhs>
                        <rhs>= temp_result;</rhs>
                    </assignment>
                </false>
            </if>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
